entities.name: Worker Lifecycle
entities.context: Framework describing how parent conversations spawn independent worker conversations that complete work and return results

entities.name: Parent Conversation
entities.context: The initiating conversation that spawns workers and later reviews/integrates their output

entities.name: Worker Conversation
entities.context: Independent conversation spawned by parent to complete work asynchronously

entities.name: Async Communication
entities.context: Non-blocking communication pattern where parent and worker conversations operate independently

relationships.context: Parent spawns worker, then reviews and integrates worker output
The worker lifecycle pattern relies on async, non-blocking communication between conversations
